headline: SpaceX Buys 8% of Tesla’s Cybertrucks—and It Doesn’t Get a Discount
summary: FEATURE  You would think Tesla would give SpaceX a volume discount. That isn’t the case, though. It turns out, one of the biggest fans of Tesla’s Cybertruck is SpaceX. Elon Musk’s rocket company has spent $131 million on the avant-garde truck.
